'''Shettora''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="Orbit" /> in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].<ref name="Date">{{FarOrbitDate}}</ref> By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Shettora controlled a [[Shettora's criminal faction|criminal faction]] that operated out of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]' [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], in which a fellow Hutt by the name of [[Puullo]] served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. Shettora's organization controlled the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] on Brentaal IV, and sold decent goods at only slightly marked up prices.<ref name="Orbit" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shettora was first mentioned in [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and was a sequel of sorts to the previous publication ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', carrying on that book's theme by following the ''Far Orbit''{{'s}} adventures. The book did not specify which gender personality Shettora had.<ref name="Orbit" />
